Brownie recipe
Ingredients
180g oil
350g chocolate
65g cocoa powder
6 eggs
184g maida
344g brown sugar
1/2 tdp salt
258g white sugar
1tsp vanilla essence
Method:
Heat oil a little, enough to melt the chocolate and mix till well incorporated, then add in the cocoa powder and mix well
Beat 6 eggs till it gets fluffy and pour in the cooled down chocolate mixture and beat well
Add all the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients (maida, brown sugar, white sugar, salt ) mix well till now lumps found
Lastly add in the vanilla essence
Bake for 160°C 45-50min or according to your oven temperature
